{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Ghosts
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Ghosts]] are concerned about the tangled threads in the [[Iteration]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A committee of [[Ghosts]] determines [[Iteration]] names.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Iteration names are determined by a committee of Ghosts, not by whoever makes the world.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
